<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace PhpParser\Node\Stmt; use PhpParser\Node; class Do_ extends Node\Stmt { /** @var Node\Stmt[] Statements */ public array $stmts; /** @var Node\Expr Condition */ public Node\Expr $cond; /** * Constructs a do while node. * * @param Node\Expr $cond Condition * @param Node\Stmt[] $stmts Statements * @param array<string, mixed> $attributes Additional attributes */ public function __construct(Node\Expr $cond, array $stmts = [], array $attributes = []) { $this->attributes = $attributes; $this->cond = $cond; $this->stmts = $stmts; } public function getSubNodeNames(): array { return ['stmts', 'cond']; } public function getType(): string { return 'Stmt_Do'; } }
